target: 37. Uninvited Visitor?
I'm home. Sorry, Mio. I'm late—
Ah~~. Welcome home, Shin-chan...
What are you doing standing in the kitchen?
You can tell just by looking, right~~~~.
There were onions and chicken in the fridge, so I thought I'd stir-fry them, but...
When I was cutting the onions, tears started pouring out and I couldn't see anything anymore~~~!
Hey, that's dangerous! Don't rub your eyes with the hand holding the knife!
Ugh, but~~.
(Huh?)
(Up until the last loop, there was never a development where Mio cooked!!)
(It's bad if the future changes and becomes harder to predict. I need to get things back to the same flow as before...)
I-I'll make dinner! Why are you...
Shin-chan, you've looked sick since this morning... So, um...
I thought maybe I could make something for you...!! *Sniffle*...
(She was doing this... for me...!!)
…I see.
Thanks... but leave the rest to me. It's too dangerous to watch you!
Ugh!? But...
...No need to worry. I'm fine now. Here, let me have the knife.
(Shadows hate having their main body on the ground touched...)
(I think it's fine, but just in case, I'll step on Mio's shadow...)
...G-Go wash your face!
(Thank goodness... Mio isn't a Shadow yet.)
(Anyway, what was she trying to make?)
(Potatoes, onions, chicken... Can I still pivot this into curry?)
(Good grief... She has her cute moments...)
(...No, what am I saying, Shinpei!! "Different developments" are bad!)
(Ah... that's right. Because of me, Mio's actions have already changed.)
(I'll make curry. Because that's the same action I've taken up until now...)
(Well, the fact that Nagumo-sensei and the others are waiting outside fully armed makes it completely different from before, though...)
(Anyway, I should try not to change any actions other than those "to kill the Shadows.")
(In particular, if I change things like what someone sees, hears, or eats, it will cause changes in people's actions...)
(That would cause a chain reaction, making it highly likely that the future changes significantly. If that happens, the future I saw will become useless.)
(It'd be fine if that led to a good future, but I can't be that optimistic.)
Hey, Mio. Your stomach is growling super loud... Are you really that hungry—
...Huh?
…Yeah.
Ah! Could it be... curry for dinner tonight?
Shinpei's curry!?
...Ah. Aaaah... ah...
Ushio!!!?
(...N-No!! Not Ushio... it's the Shadow "Ushio"!!)
Not this again... Jeez! You look like you've seen a ghost!!
Because, you're... Why!?
Y-You're supposed to show up... at the summer festival on the 24th, right...!?
Huh!? How do you know about that!!?
Huh…?
Look, Shinpei... You might not believe me, but listen closely!
Something terrible is going to happen on the 24th...!!
Everyone gets swallowed up by these pitch-black shadow monsters... and disappears...!!!
...W-Wait a minute. D-Don't tell me... you're also...
Did you come from that summer festival...!!?
...Huh!? D-Don't tell me you did too, Shinpei!!?
I washed my eyes, so I feel a bit better now...
...Hm? What's wrong, Shin-chan? Why are you sitting on the kitchen floor...
N-No...! Nothing!?
(I-I need to act normal for now...)
(From Mio's position, she shouldn't be able to see Ushio hiding here... I can't let her notice—)
W-What!?
Could this smell be... C-Curry!!?
C-Correct!
Wow~~! I didn't think of that...!!
(This is bad...! Ushio's stomach is growling...!)
Fufu! Shin-chan, your stomach is rumbling so loud~~.
Just like Sis...!
Thank goodness... If you're hungry, that means you're doing okay!
W-Well, yeah~~~~.
(Calm down, calm down. Look at the curry-making process objectively and calm down!)
(Finely chop the onions. Grate the garlic and ginger. Roughly chop the tomatoes...)
...W-Well then... Next... I'll fry the chicken~~~.
(T-This situation is really bad... I have to get Ushio out of here somehow...)
(T-That's it...! The notepad! I'll use this to pass a message to Ushio...)
(Ugh, why is this happening…)
(Nagumo-sensei... This is way beyond the level of a "different development"!!)
Sorry Shinpei, I'm late! Karikiri-san's stories are so long...
W-Welcome back, Alain... It'll be ready soon.
Welcome back, Dad!
Oh, I'm home... Hey, Mio! You should be helping out, too.
I specialize in eating!!
Good grief... Hm, smells good. Ushio's favorite, huh...
(Ushio! Notice it! Look at this memo!)
(In about 5 minutes, Alain will go to the washroom, and Mio will go to the bathroom—)
(Head to my room while they're gone. Don't get caught!!)
…Got it.
A-Alright. It's done...!!
Wow~, looks delicious~!
You've gotten even better, haven't you, Shinpei.
Y-You think so? Well, let's dish it out before it gets cold~...
(Alain and Mio moved just like I remembered, and Ushio was able to get to my room...)
(I'll just casually head back to my room now, too.)

Huh?
Where are you going, Shin-chan?
Oh, uh... I'm gonna eat in my room.
...Huh? With two plates!?
U-Uh... Well, you see, I'm super hungry...!!
Haha! I'm feeling totally fine now... Ahahahaha~~.
Ushio…
Curry!
Curry, curry! Curry~~~~!
Hn! Hn!!
(Th... this is... The Rhythm of Curry!!)
(That mysterious ritual Ushio does when her craving for curry hits its peak and she gets super hyped!)
(Daaamn it~~~~~~~~. W-Why did things turn out like this!!)
Do not let the Shadows' appearances and words sway your heart, Shinpei Ajiro.
From now on, even if they appear in the form of your friends or family... or someone you love, you must not hesitate.
(I know. If I don't, it's all over...)
(When the Ushio in front of me reveals her true nature...)
(I'll stab her Shadow with the fruit knife I hid and brought with me...!)
Hey, Shinpei. Can I eat...?
…Yeah…
